notes:
Phase 8: WASM + web-console. Ported the P2P surface to WASM and updated the web-console to use WASM exports.

T-80 (WasmWebRtcChannel): Added crates/mxdx-p2p/src/channel/wasm.rs implementing WebRtcChannel trait using web-sys::RtcPeerConnection. Translates JS callbacks to Rust futures via wasm-bindgen closures. Handles ICE candidate buffering, data channel lifecycle, and frame size limits. No libdatachannel symbols in WASM output.

T-81 (mxdx-core-wasm P2P re-export): Added P2PCrypto, P2PCryptoWithKey, generateSessionKey, createP2PCrypto, fetchTurnCredentials, turnToIceServers to mxdx-core-wasm public API. SealedKey methods renamed from pub(crate) to_invite_b64/from_invite_b64 to pub to_base64/from_base64 to support cross-crate access. Both nodejs and web WASM targets build successfully.

T-82 (web-console swap): Updated packages/web-console/src/terminal-view.js to import P2PCrypto, generateSessionKey, createP2PCrypto, fetchTurnCredentials, turnToIceServers from WASM module (../../core/wasm/web/mxdx_core_wasm.js). P2PSignaling and P2PTransport remain as JS imports — the WASM P2PTransport is a stub pending full driver implementation.

T-83 (npm shim deprecation): Added @deprecated JSDoc and console.warn to p2p-crypto.js, p2p-signaling.js, p2p-transport.js. Updated MANIFEST.md with mxdx-p2p public symbols and deprecated shim table.

T-83a (launcher audit): Launcher imports from @mxdx/core (not individual shim files). Stays on npm path: Node.js runtime, WASM P2PTransport is a stub, P2PSignaling is JS-only. No migration needed.

T-84 (wasm-pack tests + Playwright): 12 WASM tests pass (7 channel + 5 crypto) via wasm-pack test --headless --firefox. All native-only integration test files cfg-gated with #![cfg(not(target_arch = "wasm32"))]. Moved proptest and trybuild to native-only dev-dependencies to fix wasm32 compilation. Created Playwright federated smoke test (web-console-rust-p2p-beta.test.js).

SECURITY INVARIANTS VERIFIED:
- WASM channel never logs or inspects payload bytes
- SealedKey debug impl shows <redacted>
- EncryptedFrame debug impl redacts ciphertext
- P2PCrypto uses proper key zeroization on drop
- fetchTurnCredentials validates URL scheme (https or loopback http)
- scripts/check-no-unencrypted-sends.sh green
- No new send_raw / skip_encryption patterns
- No XSS surface in WASM JSON returns

PRE-EXISTING ISSUE (not Phase 8 regression): web-console npm build fails because p2p-verify.js imports node:crypto which Vite Rollup can't bundle for browser. Dev server works fine.

tasks_closed.task: T-82: web-console swap to WASM exports
T-83a: Launcher audit (stays on npm path)

follow_ups.title: Fix web-console production build: p2p-verify.js node:crypto import breaks Vite Rollup
Implement WASM P2PTransport driver to replace JS P2PTransport in web-console
